headline: Recent inflation data was 'bad news,' Fed's Goolsbee says
summary: Inflation data last weekwas bad news for the U.S. Federal Reserve and means the Fedneeds to be cautious about rate cuts until inflation begins torecede, Chicago Fed President Austan Goolsbee said...
